social.text: Les Bleues sont qualifiées pour la Coupe du monde ! Cap sur le Brésil en juin 2027. Toute la France sera derrière vous.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text: The Patrouille de France flying over the Statue of Liberty today. What a symbol. 250 years of shared history.

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
Nigeria’s economy is 6–8 times larger than El Salvador’s.

Even its GDP is eight times bigger than theirs. 

Nigeria is richer than El Salvador, and yet it cannot even boast of having a world-class hospital like this.


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)

The best hospital in Central Am
